archimate:ApplicationInterface.name: eNotification
archimate:ApplicationInterface.documentation:
Definition: The eNotification Application service refers to a software application or component that enables the electronic delivery of notifications, alerts, and messages to individuals or organizations. It operates at the application layer in a software architecture, providing the necessary functionality to create, manage, and distribute notifications through various channels
Source: International Journal of Engineering Research & Technology
Source reference: https://www.ijert.org/research/managing-user-notifications-in-enterprise-applications-IJERTV7IS010324.pdf
LOST view: TVA-API Enablers [Motivation]
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/ENotificationApplicationInterface
ABB name: egovera:ENotificationApplicationInterface
EIRA concept: eira:ArchitectureBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2023-11-20
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/ENotificationApplicationInterface
Interoperability Layer: TechnicalApplication

properties.value: The eNotification Application service refers to a software application or component that enables the electronic delivery of notifications, alerts, and messages to individuals or organizations. It operates at the application layer in a software architecture, providing the necessary functionality to create, manage, and distribute notifications through various channels
International Journal of Engineering Research & Technology
